pkgmetadata.longdescription: markdown2 A fast and complete Python implementation of Markdown.Markdown is a text-to-HTML filter it translates an easy-to-read easy-to-write structured text format into HTML. Markdowns textformat is most similar to that of plain text email, and supportsfeatures such as headers, emphasis, code blocks, blockquotes, andlinks. -- httpdaringfireball.netprojectsmarkdownThis is a fast and complete Python implementation of the Markdownspec. See httpgithub.comtrentmpython-markdown2 for more info.
